description_short: Three compact cushions that support your neck, back, and hips, ensuring comfort during long drives.

faq_specs.question: What is included in the SleepyCat Ergo Car Bundle?
faq_specs.answer: The bundle includes Car Neck Cushion, Car Back Cushion, Car Seat Cushion, designed to provide complete comfort and ergonomic support while driving.

notes_observed: Lighter/compact alternative to [[ergo-car-bundle]] (Pro Car Bundle). Uses Slim variants (Slim Back + Slim Seat + Car Neck) instead of Pro variants. 0.8kg vs 2.5kg. Similar price (₹3478 vs ₹3442) — Slim bundle priced slightly higher despite less foam, likely due to compact appeal.
